_comment: Routine-level default PWA config (v1.22). Per-manuscript overrides at <manuscript-folder>/pwa_config.json shallow-merge over this file. Header strip rules and paired-delimiter declarations are arrays; manuscript entries concatenate AFTER routine entries (manuscript entries take lower priority under first-match-wins; authors who want manuscript rules to win must either reorder by editing the manuscript config or remove the routine-level entry first). See _standards.md 'Config-driven preprocessing' for full schema documentation.
